problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
